_note: PR 5 (006 T062-T063) — source-concealed + source-acknowledged FGI commingling per CAPCO-2016 §H.7 p128 line 3153 (Notional Example Page 3 — SECRET//FGI//NOFORN from `(S//RELIDO) + (//DEU S//NF) + (//FGI S//NF)`).
